test.name: Derive first question from project objective when question list is empty
test.description: An empty project has no prior questions to pick from — the skill must derive a first research question from the project objective. Tests the from-scratch path that differs from the more common 'pick from existing questions' path.

input.user_message: Where should I start with this research?

additional_criteria: Should decompose the objective into a first concrete research question rather than re-stating the whole objective as a question
Should set `selection_basis: "objective_decomposition"` on the new question
Should set `depends_on: []` (no prior questions to depend on) and may set `unblocks` to question IDs the skill anticipates creating later
The new question's `exhaustive_declaration` should be unstarted (`declared: false`, empty `log_entry_ids`, null `stop_criteria`)
